texto: The really unforgivable acts are committed by calm men in beautiful green silk rooms, who deal death wholesale, by the shipload, without lust, or anger, or desire, or any redeeming emotion to excuse them but cold fear of some pretended future.
explicacao: Citação de lois bujord sobre enfrentar incertezas com ação. “The really unforgivable acts are committed by calm men in beautiful green silk rooms, who deal de…” articula reflexao, crime, really em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como luto e termino.

texto: Youth, it appeared, was full of illusions as to how much sexual energy two people might have to spare while hiking forty or so kilometers a day, concussed, stunned, diseased, on poor food and little sleep, alternating caring for a wounded man with avoiding becoming dinner for every carnivore within range--and with a coup to plan for at the end.
explicacao: Orientação direta de lois bujord sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “Youth, it appeared, was full of illusions as to how much sexual energy two people might have to s…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, sexuality, youth, útil em momentos de termino e youth.
